creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
my choice, I don't want the tech support problems with unsupported scripts.

if you were to have checked pr database, you would see several people 
have asked before and I have rejected it.

if you want to use it yourself, then use it yourself. its not going to 
be added, its not going to be supported.

if you follow the users@spamassassin mailing list, you will see this has 
been brought up for linux systems also. 

did you consider running other channels first? what happens when the pgp 
fails.  did you consider downloading the new php keys?

what about sa-compile? you do an sa-update without compile, you break 
things.

no, I am not adding it. it is not generic enough, and I consider this 
issue closed.



-- 
Michael Scheidell, President
